evidence: "I enjoy the show a lot for a variety of reasons..."
"The focus of the story never deviates--it's a romance through and through."
"The action was dramatic and exciting and drove the story to a satisfying conclusion."
"I thought the pacing was great for a romance."
"The Good Guys offers a taste of crime and mystery without the too serious treatment it often gets on TV."
"I usually prefer more obviously heroic heroes..."
"The digital edition of this seems well done, and the sound didn't give me any trouble."
"As a long-time Star Trek fan, McCoy has always been a favorite..."
"I loved the movie, not so much because it was the best episode of the series..."
"The show takes scientifically challenging subjects and creates educational entertainment from them."
"There was even one surprisingly touching moment in the second episode that choked me up!"
"I tend to only rewatch series if they end in a way that I like..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and romance genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They value emotional resonance in their viewing experiences and show some loyalty to familiar franchises, particularly in sci-fi and horror.
